name: IPEKA Integrated Christian School

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Komplek Taman Meruya Ilir, Jl. Batu Mulia Blok K, Meruya Utara, Jakarta Barat 11620, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Christian school with Cambridge curriculum. Multiple campuses across Greater Jakarta. Popular with Indonesian Christian families seeking quality academics.
paragraphs: Christian school with Cambridge curriculum. Multiple campuses across Greater Jakarta. Popular with Indonesian Christian families seeking quality academics.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$6.2K – US$20K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Campus in West Jakarta, Science laboratories, Computer labs, Library, Sports facilities.
